title: Error reading properties of undefined in environments feature
symptom: When using the Pull and Push buttons in the environments feature, n8n throws an error: 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'type')'. This prevents the expected functionality from working.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different feature
root_cause: This error occurs due to a bug introduced in n8n version 1.99.1 that affects the environments feature. The code attempts to access a property of an undefined object, which leads to this runtime error when trying to perform Git operations.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 1.100.0 or later
Retry using the Pull and Push buttons in the environments feature
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to at least version 1.100.0 to resolve the error.
